basic_details.job_title: IIT Patna Research Associate I Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.short_information: Indian Institute of Technology Patna (IIT Patna) Research Associate - I (RA-I) Notification 2026 has been released on the official website of IIT Patna. A total of 1 vacancy has been announced through the IIT Patna Research Associate - I (RA-I) Recruitment 2026.

qualification.education_qualification: Ph.D. in Mechanical, Aerospace, Chemical or equivalent, M.Tech in Mechanical, Thermal, Chemical, Aerospace or equivalent with 3 years experience
qualification.details: Ph.D. (Mechanical, Aerospace, and Chemical, or equivalent, thesis submitted will be considered) with prior research experience in the broad area of physical sciences as evidenced through quality journal publications, patents, and technology development. OR M.Tech. (Mechanical, Thermal, Chemical, Aerospace, or equivalent) with 3 years’ experience in an area relevant to project needs. The candidate should have demonstrated research interest through quality journal publications, patents, and technology development.

salary_details.details: Rs 58000 per month + HRA (as per GoI rules)

how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience.
Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs.
Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email.
Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification.
Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-07-2026.
Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Research Associate - I (RA-I) Vacancy 2026 Notification PDF
content_sections.text: Candidates who are interested in applying for the IIT Patna Recruitment 2026 should first download and carefully read the official notification PDF. The notification contains complete details about vacancy distribution, eligibility criteria, age limit, stipend/salary, selection process, important dates, and application instructions. Reading the official document is important to ensure that you meet all requirements before submitting the application form. Download IIT Patna Research Associate - I (RA-I) Job 2026 Notification PDF

content_sections.text: Ph.D. (Mechanical, Aerospace, and Chemical, or equivalent, thesis submitted will be considered) with prior research experience in the broad area of physical sciences as evidenced through quality journal publications, patents, and technology development. OR M.Tech. (Mechanical, Thermal, Chemical, Aerospace, or equivalent) with 3 years’ experience in an area relevant to project needs. The candidate should have demonstrated research interest through quality journal publications, patents, and technology development.

IIT Patna Research Associate - I (RA-I) Selection Process 2026
How to Apply
content_sections.text: Read the official notification carefully before applying. Prepare your application with complete bio-data including personal details, educational qualifications, and experience. Attach self-attested copies of all required documents such as educational certificates, experience certificates, ID proof, and recent passport-size photographs. Clearly mention the post applied for in the subject line of the email. Send the complete application to the official email address mentioned in the notification. Ensure the email is sent before the last date: 18-07-2026. Keep a copy of the sent email for future reference.

content_sections.heading: IIT Patna Research Associate - I (RA-I) Recruitment 2026 - Important Links

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for the IIT Patna Research Associate – I (RA-I) recruitment?
faq.answer: The last date to submit your email application for the Research Associate – I (RA-I) position at IIT Patna is 18th July 2026. Ensure your application reaches before this deadline.

faq.question: Q2. What is the salary offered for the Research Associate – I (RA-I) post?
faq.answer: The selected candidate for the Research Associate – I (RA-I) position will receive a monthly salary of Rs. 58,000 plus HRA as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q3. What are the minimum qualifications required for this position?
faq.answer: Candidates need to have a Ph.D. in Mechanical, Aerospace, or Chemical engineering, or an M.Tech. in Mechanical, Thermal, Chemical, or Aerospace engineering with at least 3 years of relevant experience.

faq.question: Q4. How can I apply for the IIT Patna Research Associate – I (RA-I) job?
faq.answer: Applications are to be submitted via email. You need to send your complete application along with all necessary documents to the email address specified in the official notification.

faq.question: Q5. Is there any application fee for this recruitment?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee mentioned for any category (General/OBC, SC/ST) for this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q6. What is the selection process for the Research Associate – I (RA-I) role?
faq.answer: The selection process will involve shortlisting of eligible candidates followed by an online interview.

faq.question: Q7. How many vacancies are available for the Research Associate – I (RA-I) post?
faq.answer: There is one vacancy available for the Research Associate – I (RA-I) position in this recruitment drive by IIT Patna.

faq.question: Q8. What is the job type for this position?
faq.answer: The position of Research Associate – I (RA-I) is a contractual job.

faq.question: Q9. Where is IIT Patna located?
faq.answer: Indian Institute of Technology Patna is located in Patna, Bihar, with the pincode 801106.

faq.question: Q10. Where can I find the official notification for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The official notification can be accessed through the 'Important Links' section on this page, under the 'Official Notification PDF' link.
